title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: A multi-model workflow that routes different development phases to Claude Opus (planning and reasoning) and Gemini 3.5 Flash (UI design) to optimize cost and quality. The approach uses handoff documents to structure task transitions across models for building full-stack applications.
